name: Scientist Home Future Health Ltd
business: Scientist Home Future Health Limited sells health supplements and topical creams, and provides physical check-up services. It operates through its wholly owned subsidiary in Hong Kong, Scientist Home HK. The company serves health-conscious individuals, elderly populations, and professionals in Hong Kong.

exposures.sentence: Scientist Home Future Health Limited operates through its wholly owned subsidiary in Hong Kong, Scientist Home HK, which specializing in the retail trading of health supplements and topical creams, and provision of physical check-up services.
